title: Plan State
description: Schema for plan.yml. Tracks multi-step workflow with dependency hashes for drift detection, per-step queries for re-search, and per-step chunk references for instant context replay.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the plan was created.

updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the plan was last updated.

dependencies.description: Documentation paths this plan depends on, each with a content hash at the time the plan was last updated. Used for drift detection during plan resumption.

path.description: Documentation path relative to docs root (e.g. 'foundation/architecture-principles').

hash.description: Content hash in 'sha256:<hex>' format, recorded at the time the plan was last updated.

steps.description: Ordered steps in the plan with state, context queries, and chunk references.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the step was completed. Only set for completed steps.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when work began on this step. Only set for in-progress steps.

notes.description: Free-form notes about the step's progress or findings.

queries.description: Search terms the AI used to find relevant documentation for this step. Preserved for re-search when dependency hashes change.

chunks.description: Comma-delimited chunk ID strings, each representing one codectx generate call. Directly replayable if dependency hashes haven't changed.

blocked_by.description: Step IDs that must be completed before this step can start.

current_step.description: ID of the step currently being worked on. 0 if no step is active.
